title: The Trap Tightens Around the Alliance
description: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Jesus Burgess, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #16, Unknown person #20, Unknown person #22, Unknown person #23 as the first Colosseum fighters clash while Luffy tries to hide his identity and new rivals like Cavendish, Burgess, and Bartolomeo stand out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What an uproar of an opening event!! A truly unexpected participant!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What a twist!!! We know this masked man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: There's simply no way not to recognize this extraordinary strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The winner of the Battle Royale!!

dialogue.speaker: Jesus Burgess
dialogue.text: From the pirate crew of the Yonkou, "Blackbeard," who silences even crying babies!! Captain of the first ship!!! It's Jesus, Burgess!

summary: Pages 17–17 focus on the trap tightens around the alliance, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
